goal: mapped.second = pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, p.second)
mapped.second.first = pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, p.second).first
pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, p.second).first = g(p.second.first)
rhs.first = pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, assoc.first)
rhs.first = pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first))
pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first)).first = f(Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first).first)
pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first)).first = f(p.first)
pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first)).second = g(Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first).second)
pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first)).second = g(p.second.first)
pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, Pair.new(p.first, p.second.first)) = Pair.new(f(p.first), g(p.second.first))

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Pair[A, B] -> Pair[D, E]](pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g))

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[B, Pair[A, B], Pair[D, E]](lib(functions).identity_fn[Pair[A, B] -> Pair[D, E]](pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g)), Pair.new[A, B](p.first), p.second.first)
function[T0, T1](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x0.second) = x0 }[D, E](compose[B, Pair[A, B], Pair[D, E]](pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g), Pair.new[A, B](p.first), p.second.first))

goal: mapped.second.second = pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, p.second).second
pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, p.second).second = h(p.second.second)
mapped.first = pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, p.first)
mapped.first.first = pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, p.first).first
pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, p.first).first = f(p.first.first)
mapped.first.second = pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, p.first).second
pair_map[A, B, D, E](f, g, p.first).second = g(p.first.second)
rhs.second = pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, assoc.second)
rhs.second = pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second))
pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second)).first = g(Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second).first)
pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second)).first = g(p.first.second)
pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second)).second = h(Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second).second)
pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second)).second = h(p.second)
pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h, Pair.new(p.first.second, p.second)) = Pair.new(g(p.first.second), h(p.second))

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Pair[B, C] -> Pair[E, F]](pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h))

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[C, Pair[B, C], Pair[E, F]](lib(functions).identity_fn[Pair[B, C] -> Pair[E, F]](pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h)), Pair.new[B, C](p.first.second), p.second)
function[T0, T1](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x0.second) = x0 }[E, F](compose[C, Pair[B, C], Pair[E, F]](pair_map[B, C, E, F](g, h), Pair.new[B, C](p.first.second), p.second))

goal: curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), x, y) = compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f), Pair.new(x, y))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Pair[T0, T1] -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { curry[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(Pair.new[T0, T1](x1, x2)) }[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), x, y)

goal: compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f), Pair.new(x, y)) = h(uncurry[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x, y)))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f), Pair.new(x, y))

goal: uncurry[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x, y)) = f(Pair.new(x, y).first, Pair.new(x, y).second)

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Pair[T, U] -> V](uncurry[T, U, V](f))
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[U](y)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).second = x1 }[T, U](x, lib(functions).identity_fn(y))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).first = x0 }[T, U](x, lib(functions).identity_fn(y))

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Pair[T0, T1] -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { curry[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(Pair.new[T0, T1](x1, x2)) }[T, U, V](lib(functions).identity_fn[Pair[T, U] -> V](uncurry[T, U, V](f)), x, y)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { curry[T0, T1, T2](uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0), x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) }[T, U, V](f, x, y)

goal: f(Pair.new(x, y).first, Pair.new(x, y).second) = f(x, y)
uncurry[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x, y)) = f(x, y)
h(uncurry[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x, y))) = h(f(x, y))

p.c: function(x0: T, x1: U) { h(f(x0, x1)) = rhs(x0, x1) }(x, y)

goal: curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), x, y) = rhs(x, y)

p.c: curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f))) != function(x0: T, x1: U) { h(f(x0, x1)) }
exists(k0: T) { curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), k0) != function(x0: U) { h(f(k0, x0)) } }
let w0: T satisfy { function(x1: U) { h(f(w0, x1)) } != curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w0) }
exists(k0: U) { h(f(w0, k0)) != curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w0, k0) }
let w1: T satisfy { curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w1) != function(x2: U) { h(f(w1, x2)) } }
exists(k0: U) { h(f(w1, k0)) != curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w1, k0) }
let w2: U satisfy { h(f(w0, w2)) != curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w0, w2) }
curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w0) != function(x0: T, x1: U) { h(f(x0, x1)) }(w0)
exists(k1: U) { h(f(w0, k1)) != curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w0, k1) }
let w3: U satisfy { h(f(w0, w3)) != curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w0, w3) }
let w4: U satisfy { curry[T, U, W](compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, uncurry[T, U, V](f)), w0, w4) != h(f(w0, w4)) }
function(x0: T, x1: U) { h(f(x0, x1)) = rhs(x0, x1) }(w0, w3)

goal: lhs(p) = function(x0: T, x1: U) { h(curry[T, U, V](f, x0, x1)) }(p.first, p.second)

p.c: function(x0: Pair[T, U]) { uncurry[T, U, W](function(x1: T, x2: U) { h(curry[T, U, V](f, x1, x2)) }, x0) = lhs(x0) }(p)
uncurry[T, U, W](function(x0: T, x1: U) { h(curry[T, U, V](f, x0, x1)) }, p) != h(curry[T, U, V](f, p.first, p.second))
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0(x1.first, x1.second) = uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, W](function(x2: T, x3: U) { h(curry[T, U, V](f, x2, x3)) }, p)

goal: function(x0: T, x1: U) { h(curry[T, U, V](f, x0, x1)) }(p.first, p.second) = h(curry[T, U, V](f, p.first, p.second))
curry[T, U, V](f, p.first, p.second) = f(Pair.new(p.first, p.second))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Pair[T0, T1] -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { curry[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(Pair.new[T0, T1](x1, x2)) }[T, U, V](f, p.first, p.second)

goal: h(curry[T, U, V](f, p.first, p.second)) = h(f(Pair.new(p.first, p.second)))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: Pair[T0, T1]) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x0.second) = x0 }[T, U](p)
function(x0: Pair[T, U]) { compose[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, f, x0) = rhs(x0) }(p)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Pair[T, U], V, W](h, f, p)
